description: This file defines the Alert class for Bootstrap, implementing alert component behavior including show/hide functionality, event handling, and jQuery integration.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: A class representing Bootstrap's alert component, providing methods to close and manage alert elements.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the alert, triggers close event, and removes the element if not prevented.

methods.name: _destroyElement
methods.description: Removes the alert element from DOM and triggers the closed event.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of alert methods.
